hero.title: Sudanese Hausa International Organization
hero.subtitle: Together we build a better future for Sudan and Chad through humanitarian projects and community development.

about.title: About SHIO VZW
about.subtitle: Who we are
about.description: SHIO VZW (Sudanese Hausa International Organization) is a Belgian non-profit organization based in Turnhout. We finance humanitarian and development projects in Sudan and Chad, aiming to improve the lives of vulnerable communities. Our organization connects the Belgian Hausa community with their roots and mobilizes resources for meaningful impact.

donate.title: Support Us
donate.description: Your donation makes a difference. Every contribution helps us finance humanitarian projects in Sudan and Chad.
